notes:
EX-era (ex Series) booster: 9 cards/pack = 1 rare-or-better + ~3 uncommon + ~4 common + 1 reverse-holo (Bulbapedia Booster_pack(TCG): "e-Card through entirety of EX Series, boosters had only 9 cards"; reverse-holo every pack since Legendary Collection). Box = 36 packs, no ETB (era-correct).

Rare slot distribution derived from sourced rates:
- Gold Star ~1:72 packs = 0.014 (dondiegotrading + Flipside, both cite "approximately 1:72 packs / 1 per 2 booster boxes"). Set has 3 Gold Stars (Mudkip/Torchic/Treecko 107-109/109).
- Pokemon-ex (Rocket's ex) ~3 per box of 36 = 0.083 (dondiegotrading: "~three EX cards per box", consistent with Flipside ex-era ~1:12-18). Set has 11 Rocket's-ex (96-106).
- Secret rare ~1:36 packs total = 0.028 (Flipside: comparable ex-era sets ex Dragon and Team Magma vs Aqua "approximately 1:36 packs"). TRR has 2 secret rares: Charmeleon 110/109 and Here Comes Team Rocket! 111/109.
- Remaining 0.875 of the rare slot split rare-holo 0.25 vs non-holo rare 0.625, anchored to dondiegotrading "~nine holos per box" (9/36=0.25); set has 14 rare-holo + 14 rare buckets. Rest of rare slots = plain rare.
Rare slot sums to 1.0 exactly.

Reverse-holo slot mapped to set's available buckets (no dedicated reverse-holo bucket exists for this set) as common/uncommon filler 0.6/0.4 (era-typical, commons weighted heavier). Uncommon slots -> uncommon 1.0; common slots -> common 1.0.

Confidence LOW: no per-set published pull-rate STUDY for TRR; figures are era-average community rates (pokebeach/pokegym-sourced via Flipside, plus dondiegotrading) applied to this set. Gold-star and secret-rare anchors are solid era values; rare-holo vs rare split is the softest assumption. Vintage sealed box carries large collector premium so EV/pack will sit well below box price (expected).
